title: Phishing email targeting local remote workers
details: Multiple residents reported fake payroll reset emails with suspicious links.

title: Streetlight outage near senior center
details: Three blocks have reduced visibility after dusk due to streetlight failures.

title: Phone scam impersonating utility company
details: Callers demand immediate payment and threaten service disconnection.

title: Repeated posts about same suspicious van
details: Multiple near-identical posts mention a white van circling two blocks at night.

title: Suspicious QR code stickers near subway gates
details: Commuters reported QR stickers that redirect to fake account login pages.

title: Package theft spike in apartment lobby
details: Residents reported repeated package theft from unsecured building mailrooms.

title: Fake bank SMS asks for one-time code
details: Messages impersonate local bank security teams and request OTP codes.

title: Water main break causing street flooding
details: A burst pipe flooded two intersections and blocked night traffic.

title: Unknown caller claims emergency tax penalty
details: Callers pressure seniors to pay immediately using gift cards.

title: Reports of repeated door-handle checks at night
details: Several residents reported people trying parked car door handles after midnight.
